articles.title: ArcANE: Do Role-Playing Language Agents Stay in Character at the Right Time?
articles.excerpt: Role-playing language agents (RPLAs) should play characters whose values and behavior evolve as the story progresses, not maintain a fixed persona. Existing benchmarks measure factual recall at a given chapter, not whether responses align with the character's psychological trajectory, especially in
articles.summary: 针对角色扮演代理需随剧情发展保持角色一致性的问题，提出 ArcANE 基准。该基准评估模型在角色心理轨迹演变中的表现，而非仅测试事实召回，填补了动态角色行为评估的空白。

articles.title: TIDE: Proactive Multi-Problem Discovery via Template-Guided Iteration
articles.excerpt: Agents are widely deployed as assistants over documents, tools, and code. However, they typically act only on explicit user requests, which surface only the problems the user has noticed, while many other important problems coexist, hidden in plain sight, within the broader user context, with their
articles.summary: 针对现有 Agent 仅响应用户显式请求而忽略隐藏问题的缺陷，提出 TIDE 框架。该方法通过模板引导的迭代过程，主动在用户上下文中发现多个潜在问题，提升辅助系统的全面性与主动性。

articles.title: AdaPlanBench: Evaluating Adaptive Planning in Large Language Model Agents under World and User Constraints
articles.excerpt: Planning for real-world problems by language models often involves both world and user constraints, which may not be fully specified upfront and are progressively disclosed through interaction. However, existing benchmarks still underexplore adaptive planning under such progressively revealed dual c
articles.summary: 针对现实规划中约束条件渐进揭示的特点，提出 AdaPlanBench 基准。该基准评估 LLM Agent 在世界与用户双重约束动态变化下的自适应规划能力，填补了交互式规划场景的评估空白。

articles.title: VideoKR: Towards Knowledge- and Reasoning-Intensive Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: We introduce VideoKR, the first large-scale training corpus specifically designed to strengthen knowledge- and reasoning-intensive video understanding. It comprises 315K video reasoning examples over 145K newly collected, CC-licensed, expert-domain videos. We develop a human-in-the-loop, skill-orien
articles.summary: 构建了 VideoKR，首个专注于增强知识和密集推理的大规模视频理解语料库。该数据集包含 31.5 万个推理示例和 14.5 万个专家领域视频，采用人机回路和技能导向标注，显著提升模型的视频推理能力。

articles.title: RobotValues: Evaluating Household Robots When Human Values Conflict
articles.excerpt: While household robots are often evaluated based on task completion, everyday domestic environments involve value-conflicting situations in which robots are expected to choose actions that prioritize other values than task success, such as human autonomy, efficiency, or social appropriateness. Yet,
articles.summary: 提出 RobotValues 基准，用于评估家庭机器人在价值观冲突场景下的决策能力。该基准不仅考察任务完成率，更关注机器人在人类自主性、效率与社会得体性等价值冲突中的表现。

articles.title: Reinforcement Learning Elicits Contextual Learning of Unseen Language Translation
articles.excerpt: Prior work has shown that large language models (LLMs) can translate unseen or low-resource languages by undergoing continued training or even by encoding a grammar book in their context. However, both methods typically overfit specific languages, with limited zero-shot transfer at test time. To tra
articles.summary: 针对现有翻译方法对新语言过泛化的问题，采用强化学习促使 LLM 习得未见语言的上下文学习能力。该方法在零样本迁移测试中表现出色，有效提升了低资源语言的翻译泛化性。

articles.title: LoomVideo: Unifying Multimodal Inputs into Video Generation and Editing
articles.excerpt: Developing unified video generation and editing models capable of interpreting interleaved multimodal inputs is a promising yet challenging frontier field. Existing unified frameworks predominantly rely on massive models (typically 13B parameters or more) and incorporate source video conditions for
articles.summary: 提出 LoomVideo 框架，统一处理交错的多模态输入以实现视频生成与编辑。与依赖大模型（13B+ 参数）的现有方案不同，该框架在参数效率上具有优势，支持源视频条件下的统一操作。

articles.title: Rethinking Continual Experience Internalization for Self-Evolving LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Experience internalization converts contextual experience from past interactions into reusable parametric capability, offering a promising path toward continual learning in large language models (LLMs). While prior work has predominantly focused on single-iteration transfer, we discover that under m
articles.summary: 反思自演化 LLM Agent 的经验内化机制，发现单次迭代方法存在局限性。研究指出多轮迭代中的干扰问题，并提出了改进的持续学习方法，以更有效地将交互经验转化为参数化能力。

articles.title: Dream.exe: Can Video Generation Models Dream Executable Robot Manipulation?
articles.excerpt: Video generation models have made impressive strides in synthesizing visually compelling content, yet their outputs remain confined to the virtual domain. A natural question follows: how well do these models reflect the physical world when their generated videos leave the screen and enter reality? W
articles.summary: 探索视频生成模型生成内容的物理可实现性，提出 Dream.exe 框架。该方法评估生成的视频片段能否转化为可执行的机器人操作指令，连接了虚拟视频生成与现实物理世界之间的鸿沟。

articles.title: AffordanceVLA: A Vision-Language-Action Model Empowering Action Generation through Affordance-Aware Understanding
articles.excerpt: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models leverage the rich world knowledge of pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) to enable instruction-following robotic manipulation. However, the structural mismatch between VLM semantic spaces and embodied control policies often hinders the learning of precise per
articles.summary: 提出 AffordanceVLA，通过引入功能感知理解来解决 VLA 模型中语义空间与控制策略的结构失配问题。该方法显著提升了模型执行指令式机器人操作的精确度，增强了生成动作的有效性。

articles.title: MAOAM: Unified Object and Material Selection with Vision-Language Models
articles.excerpt: Selection is a core operation in interactive image editing. To be practical, a user should be able to specify and disambiguate the desired selection region through either text or click-based interactions, and the system should support selecting not only objects but also other criteria, such as mater
articles.summary: 提出 MAOAM 统一框架，利用 VLM 支持基于文本或点击的交互，实现图像编辑中对象与材质的联合选择。该系统解决了传统工具仅能选择对象的局限，提升了编辑交互的灵活性与实用性。

articles.title: LLMs Can Leak Training Data But Do They Want To? A Propensity-Aware Evaluation of Memorization in LLMs
articles.excerpt: Large language models can reproduce training data, but existing memorization evaluations mostly measure whether models can be forced to do so, rather than whether they do so under ordinary use. We introduce PropMe, a propensity-aware framework for memorization evaluation that contrasts prefix-based
articles.summary: 提出 PropMe 评估框架，对比模型在普通使用与特定提示下的输出， propensity-aware 地测量 LLM 的记忆泄露倾向。该方法超越了传统的强制提取评估，更真实地反映了模型在日常应用中的数据隐私风险。

articles.title: The Shadow Price of Reasoning: Economic Perspective on Optimal Budget Allocation for LLMs
articles.excerpt: Inference-time scaling has emerged as a critical avenue for enhancing Large Language Models' performance, yet real-world deployment is constrained by strict computational budgets. In this work, we formulate inference budget allocation as a global constrained optimization problem governed by economic
articles.summary: 从经济学视角将 LLM 推理预算分配视为全局约束优化问题，提出最佳预算分配策略。该方法在严格计算预算约束下，通过经济模型优化推理时的资源分配，最大化模型性能表现。

articles.title: World-Language-Action Model for Unified World Modeling, Language Reasoning, and Action Synthesis
articles.excerpt: We propose world-language-action (WLA) models as a new class of embodied foundation models. WLA takes textual instructions, images, and robot states as inputs to jointly predict textual subtasks, subgoal images, and robot actions, conjoining the world modeling interface to learn from extensive egoce
articles.summary: 提出 World-Language-Action (WLA) 模型类，统一世界建模、语言推理与动作合成。该模型联合预测文本子任务、子目标图像和机器人动作，利用大规模第一人称视觉数据学习具身基础能力。

articles.title: Latent Reasoning with Normalizing Flows
articles.excerpt: Large language models often improve reasoning by generating explicit chain-of-thought (CoT), demonstrating the importance of intermediate computation. However, textual CoT forces this computation through a discrete, serial, and communication-oriented token stream: each reasoning step must be verbali
articles.summary: 提出利用 Normalizing Flows 进行潜在推理，替代传统的离散文本 CoT。该方法将推理步骤映射到连续流空间，避免了离散 Token 流的串行瓶颈，提升了模型处理中间计算步骤的效率与表达能力。

articles.title: Meta-Cognitive Memory Policy Optimization for Long-Horizon LLM Agents
articles.excerpt: Memory-augmented LLM agents tackle complex long-horizon tasks by recursively summarizing interaction trajectories into compact memory.
